summary.intent: Fix and resolve PR review comments on pull request #706 in the moltis repository.
summary.outcome: Both review comments were addressed by editing sandbox core tests, all 28 tests passed, and the fixes were committed and pushed.

repo: Sandbox tests are located in crates/tools/src/sandbox/tests/core.rs and contain at least 28 test cases.

code.finding: Two review comments required fixes in this file; changes were applied in two separate edits.

workflow: Git pushes to this repository require YubiKey authentication, which can cause push failures if the key is not tapped promptly.
PR review comments were fetched via Bash (likely gh CLI) and resolved programmatically after fixes were committed.

friction: YubiKey tap was required for the git push and needed multiple retries before succeeding, causing a manual interruption in the workflow.
